## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing Andrés Engler for the Services Hiring Manager (Technical Managing Editor) role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Andrés has 12+ years of experience in journalism, editing, and content production, with a focus on financial and tech topics](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [He's currently working at Coindesk, managing international content expansion and AI-driven translations](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Andrés emphasizes the importance of balancing quality, originality, and SEO in content production](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [He has experience in process improvement, scaling operations, and managing deadlines across multiple projects](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)

## Topics

### Professional Background

  - [12+ years in journalism and editing, starting with Argentine financial publications](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Transitioned to US-based companies \~5-6 years ago](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Currently at Coindesk, expanding international content and improving translations](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Self-describes as a "product guy" with design skills (Figma, Vercel)](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [Side projects include helping startups, investment funds, and independent authors](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)

### AI and Automation Experience

  - [Using ChatGPT for translations at Coindesk (10+ languages)](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Integration with Sanity CMS for content editing](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Exploring AI-driven content distribution across various channels (WhatsApp, Telegram)](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Identifying and addressing quality issues in AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)

### Content Quality and Scaling

  - [Prioritizes "sounding human" and maintaining an original voice](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [Balances SEO requirements with quality content](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Emphasizes good research as key to scaling content](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [Launched 7 new language versions in 2 months, achieving 300% monthly traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Aiming to launch 10-20 more languages in the next two months](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)

### Process Improvement and Feedback

  - [Identifies issues (e.g., headline/subheading problems) and proposes solutions](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Uses Jira and Notion for task management and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
  - [Emphasizes fast, clear feedback with proposed solutions](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
  - [Collaborates closely with engineering teams, offering research and ideas](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)

### Time Management and Deadlines

  - [Prioritizes 4-5 hours of deep work in the mornings](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Schedules meetings in the afternoons](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [Uses Notion for organization and task management](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)
  - [Balances work with personal life (has a daughter)](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)

### Content Presentation and Design

  - [Recognizes the importance of visual presentation in content delivery](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [Highlights the role of good interfaces and pleasing design in elevating content quality](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Follow up on Andrés' interest in contributing to GrowthX's content initiatives (The Output publication)](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)
  - [Evaluate Andrés' fit for the role based on his experience in content management, AI integration, and process improvement](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
  - [Consider Andrés' potential contributions to GrowthX's broader content strategy and thought leadership efforts](https://fathom.video/share/NT6b2EMEGX16FHe23pZYUjJs_xLCtz2b?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
